race.comment: STRIKING FELLA (2) settled well back and didn't really feature on resumption at Broome when beaten 3.4L. Mahony replaces the apprentice hoop and getting out in trip is a big tick. Should be better for that effort and in this easier race, he makes plenty of appeal. CAPRICORN MAN (3) led and was gunned down over 1615m at Broome last start in a strong performance, missing in a photo finish. He carries less weight today with the claim of Murray and has the speed to work across from the draw. Hard to knock on his latest effort and can go one better. FORTUNE'S LUCK (8) disappointed last time out but was in better form prior. This isn't much harder and the inside draw is a big tick for her chances. Can bounce back to her best form. STAR TESTYMONY (10) can improve with the fresh run under his belt. LUTZ (4) can improve third-up into the campaign.
